description: portuguese individual balance sheet (balanco individual) and income statement (demonstracao dos resultados por naturezas). extract only the current period column (31/12/2023, periodo 2023); never use the 2022 column.

companyName.description: name of the company the financial statements belong to, as printed on the report, or null if not shown on these pages.

balanceSheetDate.description: reporting date of the current period balance sheet in YYYY-MM-DD format (the 31/12/2023 column date).

balanceSheet.description: each individual line item (current-period column only) with a printed monetary amount. exclude subtotal rows, total/grand-total rows, and 'of which'/'davon' memo sub-lines. use the printed label exactly, without adding '(Summe)' or '(subtotal)'.

lineItem.description: the line item's printed label exactly as shown, without any added qualifier such as '(Summe)' or '(subtotal)'.

amount.description: the current period (31/12/2023) amount in euros as a number, no currency symbol or thousands separators; negatives kept negative.

incomeStatement.description: each individual line item (current-period column only) with a printed monetary amount. exclude subtotal rows, total/grand-total rows, and 'of which'/'davon' memo sub-lines. use the printed label exactly, without adding '(Summe)' or '(subtotal)'.

lineItem.description: the line item's printed label exactly as shown, without any added qualifier such as '(Summe)' or '(subtotal)'.

amount.description: the current period (2023) amount in euros as a number, no currency symbol or thousands separators; negatives kept negative.

totalAtivo.description: the Total do ativo amount for the current period (31/12/2023), numeric only in euros.

totalCapitalProprioEPassivo.description: the Total do capital proprio e do passivo amount for the current period (31/12/2023), numeric only in euros; reconciles with totalAtivo.

resultadoLiquido.description: the Resultado liquido do periodo for the current period (2023) from the income statement, numeric only in euros.
